title: Kanbus clock: transition labels, indent, and status text formatting

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: transition lines now render FROM:/TO: labels (darkened one step), status values are no longer hard-truncated (e.g., IN PROGRESS), and status lines are indented by 4px equivalent spacing. Also propagated per-line darkening/indent controls through notice rendering. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (14 passed).

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Done: transition formatting finalized and verified (FROM:/TO: labels, indented state lines, full status text e.g. IN PROGRESS).
